attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who capitalizes on long-range moves, particularly effective in mountaintop finishes where positioning and timing trump pure climbing watts.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Mountaintop finishes in harsh conditions where tactical positioning and resilience can overcome superior climbing pedigree; thrives when racing becomes attritional rather than explosive.
vulnerability: Likely struggles against pure climbers in straightforward power-based ascents without tactical complications or breakaway dynamics to exploit.
key_patterns: Effective in reformed breakaway scenarios requiring repeated efforts and tactical awareness
Performs well in difficult weather conditions that level the playing field
Strong finisher from reduced groups, capable of winning sprints against climbing specialists
form_trajectory: positive: Won mountaintop stage at 2018 Vuelta despite theoretically weaker climbing profile, suggesting peak form and tactical sharpness in Grand Tour's final week
